_comment: Container gateway config (OpenClaw 2026.6.x). Registers our LOCAL brain as an OpenAI-COMPATIBLE provider: NVIDIA Nemotron NVFP4 (nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-NVFP4) served by vLLM under the alias 'nemotron-nano' at http://vllm:8000/v1. Provider name 'vllm' is free-form; 'openai' is RESERVED for real OpenAI, so the model id is 'vllm/nemotron-nano' (api:'openai-completions' = use the OpenAI wire format). apiKey 'local' is accepted because baseUrl is a bare hostname on the internal core_net -- nothing leaves the box. NOTE: voice (talk/tts) is handled by ui/bridge.mjs, NOT the gateway, so the gateway needs no ElevenLabs key and stays internal-only.
